---
title: "waterbird_drought"
author: "Dana Lanceman"
date: "8/27/2021"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r set up}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(viridis)
library(rstatix)
library(ggpubr)

wbd <- read_excel("C:/Users/danal/OneDrive - UNSW/Desktop/Honours_UNSW/Assessment/cumbung_assessment/raw/waterbird_derived_complex.xlsx", "percentages")
```

Make sure to test assumptions!
```{r assumptions}
ggplot(wbd, aes(Drought,Percentage_complex)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_jitter() +
  labs(x = "", y = "% Waterbirds in wetland complexes at the Great Cumbung Swamp") +
  theme_classic() + 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 13))

ggplot(wbd, aes(Drought,Percentage_MDB)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_jitter() +
  labs(x = "", y = "% MDB waterbirds at the Great Cumbung Swamp") +
  theme_classic() + 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15))

ggqqplot(wbd, "Percentage_complex")
ggqqplot(wbd, "Percentage_MDB")

ggplot(wbd, aes(Percentage_complex)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 3)

ggplot(wbd, aes(Percentage_MDB)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.5)
```

```{r t test}
wbd %>% t_test(Percentage_complex~Drought)
wbd %>% t_test(Percentage_MDB~Drought)
```
